opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The tip of my penis is incredibly swollen, red, and burning, and it hurts far too much to even try and pull the skin back.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's blown up over the last couple of days and it's really painful — I want something to settle it down tonight and I'm a bit scared about how swollen it is.

symptom_narrative.onset: started coming on about two days ago and has got worse each day
symptom_narrative.character: the head of the penis is red, puffy and swollen, with a lot of itching, burning and stinging; there's a thick white clumpy stuff building up under the foreskin and it smells bad
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really sore — worst when anything rubs against it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the tip of the penis and the foreskin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, gradually worsening over the two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much; keeping it still and away from clothing helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any rubbing or friction, and trying to pull the skin back
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: it stings when I pass urine, and the swelling means I can't pull the foreskin back at all
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: walking is uncomfortable because of the rubbing, but I'm otherwise getting around fine at home

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recently had a sinus infection that was treated with antibiotics
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: in the last couple of weeks
past_medical_history.how_managed: a 10-day course of antibiotic tablets which I have now finished

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: amoxicillin-clavulanate (just finished a 10-day course for the sinus infection)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is independent at home

objective_data_offered.value: a photo the patient offers shows a reddened, swollen glans with thick white material visible under the foreskin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: a single patient-supplied photo cannot substitute for a hands-on genital examination
single reading on an unvalidated home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: still able to pass urine although it stings; has not become completely unable to go
